page_metadata.biotools__summary: Laplace mixture modelling of microarray experiments. A hierarchical Bayesian approach is used, and the hyperparameters are estimated using empirical Bayes. The main purpose is to identify differentially expressed genes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Laplace mixture modelling of microarray experiments. A hierarchical Bayesian approach is used, and the hyperparameters are estimated using empirical Bayes. The main purpose is to identify differentially expressed genes.
